name: quaquaval
flavor_texts: A single kick from a Quaquaval can send a truck rolling. This Pokémon uses its powerful legs to perform striking dances from far-off lands.
Dancing in ways that evoke far-away places, this Pokémon mesmerizes all that see it. Flourishes of its decorative water feathers slice into its foes.
text: Quaquaval is the Dancer Pokémon. It is a water and fighting-type Pokémon. Abilities: torrent, moxie (hidden). Base stats — HP: 85, Attack: 120, Defense: 80, Sp. Atk: 85, Sp. Def: 75, Speed: 85. Evolution line: quaxly → quaxwell → quaquaval. Lore: A single kick from a Quaquaval can send a truck rolling. This Pokémon uses its powerful legs to perform striking dances from far-off lands. Dancing in ways that evoke far-away places, this Pokémon mesmerizes all that see it. Flourishes of its decorative water feathers slice into its foes.
